programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Pyaarelal doubts his name change, but Anjali shares news of a marriage prospect. Taarak decides to stay in the house all day.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak gets permission to leave work after telling his boss about Pyaarelal's single life. Pyaarelal meets his potential bride, but her family prefer his old name.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The family of a potential bride visit Pyaarelal to check up on him. Anjali proposes that both families should engage in a conversation together to strengthen their bond.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Sharma family visits Taarak while Daya asks Jethalal to go to his house as soon as possible; Taarak and his friends attend a poetry conference.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Sharma family entertains the residents of Gokuldham with great poetry; while chatting with Jethalal and his friends, Mr Sharma says that wives can never keep secrets.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Mr Sharma challenges the men of Gokuldham to tell one secret to their wives and see whether they keep it or not; Jethalal asks Bagha to install security cameras in the society compound.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men of Gokuldham initiate the challenge of seeing whether their wives can keep secrets. Dr Hathi begins by telling his wife a secret of Bhide's and asking her to not share it with anyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tells Daya a secret about Taarak and reminds her to not reveal it to anyone; Bhide makes Bagha install security cameras in the society clubhouse.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The women of Gokuldham gather in the clubhouse to talk about their husbands' secrets. Meanwhile, Jethalal and his friends watch them through the security cameras.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men of Gokuldham confront their wives in the clubhouse and ask them why they would reveal their secrets. They further disclose that they saw them doing this on the CCTV cameras.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya informs Jethalal that she is hosting a garba class for her friends in the clubhouse. Bawree wishes to attend a garba programme and asks Bagha to buy her tickets.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bapuji, Jethalal, and Daya want Bawri and Bagha to get married immediately, and the two are happy with the arrangement.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Bhide fight over water in the morning. Daya keeps fasting for everyone's health, and Bapuji encourages everyone to fast with her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tappu teaches Daya to rap, and they end up doing Garba and rapping together. Bapuji finishes Daya's work for her, which impresses Daya.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya asks if Jethalal has planned to do anything because she is preparing a special dish, and wants him to stay in for it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Ekta takes a long time to decide on the saree she wants as the female residents in Gokuldham society go out shopping for her marriage. Jethalal stops eating to ready himself for Daya's special meal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is excited to have Daya's dinner and invites Mehata to feast with him. However, when he arrives home, he learns Daya has been out shopping with the ladies.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While shopping, Madhavi loses her purse with all the important and expensive items inside, and the ladies promise to help her find it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After coming home, Daya faces her upset family. However, she feels relieved to know that they were only pretending to be mad at her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu, Sonu, and Goli apologise to Bhide for the incident on Republic Day by giving him two movie tickets.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal agrees to help his uncle financially with his wife's treatment. Jethalal visits Taarak's house for a cup of tea.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Craving for a cup of tea, Jethalal visits Taarak's house. However, he cannot seem to find tea anywhere.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Determined to have tea with his breakfast and willing to go to any means necessary for it, Jethalal visits Sodhi and Iyer's house, but he is unsuccessful.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is unable to have a refreshing cup of tea with his breakfast in spite of visiting the houses of all his friends in Gokuldham Society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: In the police station, Inspector Chalu Pandey makes his team take an oath to maintain the cleanliness of the city.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham Society begin to joke about Jethalal's need for tea and gossip about his strange activities with his friends.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal looks through his things and finds his old radio named Gaanelal. He and Jethalal eventually try to switch it on and tune in.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and the kids see someone on the terrace of Gokuldham Society and get a good fright when they investigate.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Just as the kids inform the elders of Gokuldham Society about a white ghost, Gogi gets trapped on the terrace.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham breathe a sigh of relief as they begin believe that their colony is no longer haunted by a ghost, but Gogi begs to differ.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal's life flashes in front of his eyes when he spots a ghost in the society. His worst fears are confirmed when Tapu Sena also claim to have seen the ghost.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As more residents spot a ghost in Gokuldham, they begin to believe that their society is haunted and look for cover.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu's and his friends' families celebrate Diwali together in the evening and the kids surprise their parents by behaving.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita is looking for a new phone and Jethalal is more than happy to help her. However, he gets dissapointed when he learns of her reason.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita is looking for a new phone and Jethalal is more than happy to help her. However, he gets disappointed when he learns of her reason.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in a dilemma when Babita awaits her new mobile phone and Daya takes a life-changing oath. Meanwhile, Sunder gets enraged when he learns about Jethalal's accusation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya goes to a great extent to prove her brother right while Jethalal continues to look for the mobile phone. Then, Sunder convinces Bhide to let him stay at his house for the night.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Sundarlal stays at Bhide's house, Bhide tries to get information about Jethalal and Sundarlal's fight.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Champaklal evicts Jethalal from his house, he sets up a tent in Gokuldham Society's compound. Later, the residents approach him and demolish his tent.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: During his morning round of delivering milk, Abdul meets Babita, Anjali, and Chandu. Later, he occupies himself with writing bills as the price of milk has gone up.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Abdul's customers are suspecting him of overcharging for the milk, but he denies it. Roshan's wife thinks they should look for a new supplier.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal's son tries to get money from him by complimenting his chocolate milk. Champaklal and Jethalal give Tapu a lecture on money management. Abdul brings them their bills.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A grumpy Taarak informs Bhide and Sodhi that because of the rise in milk prices Anjali served him black tea. Bhide meets a new milkman, Santosh.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Madhavi informs Bhide that the women approve of Santosh, the new milkman. The men decide to buy milk from Santosh for a few days.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham enjoy the milk provided by Santosh and inform Abdul about it. They are taken aback by Abdul's response.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Abdul overhears Bhide, Sodhi, and Popatal talking ill about him. Tapu gives Abdul some advice and he formulates a plan.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham are extremely disturbed to learn that their milk was stolen. After discussing it among themselves, they call Abdul for a meeting.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham society are left startled when they find out that Iyer is the one who was stealing the milk from everyone's house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Abdul informs the residents of Gokuldham that after visiting the headquarters of the milk company, he gave some packets of milk delivered by Santosh to Iyer for testing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham have Santosh and his men arrested. Iyer teaches everyone how to distinguish between real and synthetic milk.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and Popatlal get into an argument over something silly, prompting Taarak Mehta to come solve their problem.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham tries to find Pom Pom to recruit her to the society. Eventually, they decide to use a set of different cats for one purpose.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: During his morning walk, Champaklal's friends propose a potential match for Tapu. Raja Mastana calls Tapu.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Joshi Kaka visits Bhide with a marriage proposal for Sonu, surprising him and everyone else. How will Bhide respond?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide discovers that Tapu and Sonu have tricked him and Champaklal. Later, he takes Raja Mastana's number from Abdul and plans to teach Raja Mastana a lesson.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Madhavi and Bhide prepare elaborately to meet Raja Mastana. Tapu and Sonu face unexpected consequences of this meeting.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide invites Raja Mastana to Gokuldham and reveals to Champaklal that he has a surprise for the guest.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Sonu learn that Bhide has invited Raja Mastana to the Gokuldham society. Bhide surprises Champaklal with an announcement.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Disappointed with Sonu for her decision, Bhide and Madhavi lash out at her. Sonu becomes frustrated and calls Tapu to come help her out.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sonu rejects all the matches that Joshi Kaka brings for her. Kanji Kaka presents Tapu with a few potential matches.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Madhavi and Sonu head to the parlour, the Mahila Mandal members rush to catch them. Bhide informs Champaklal that the groom's family are coming.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sonu feels emotional about leaving the society after her marriage. Later, she and Tapu meet and express their sadness together.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sonu has a dream where the family of the groom chosen for her approves of her. In a panic, she calls Tapu for help.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu tells Sonu that they should run away from their families and marry each other. In order to set his plan into motion, he enlists the help of his friends.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu's friends prepare to carry out his plan, but they run into some obstacles. When Sonu tries to leave her house, Bhide stands guard and blocks her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu consoles Sonu when she feels bad for deceiving her father. Bhide tells Jethalal that Tapu and Sonu have gone missing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone tries to search for Tapu and his friends, but they are nowhere to be found. Tapu and Sonu prepare for their marriage.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham members search for Tapu and Sonu, while Tapu comforts Sonu, assuring her about their decision.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide goes to the police station to file a complaint against Tapu. The other members of Gokuldham society are invited home by Tapu and Sonu.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Mahila Mandal stop Jethalal and Bhide from entering Gokuldham. Tapu and Sonu call everyone and reveal the truth behind everything.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Sonu confess that they are not married to each other and explain the real reason as to why they decided to run away from Gokuldham.
